story.title: Jurassic Park computers in excruciating detail

draft:
I just spent hours reading about the computers in Jurassic Park. 
The attention to detail in this analysis is stunning, from the Unix systems to the custom interfaces. 
Key takeaways include the use of real-world systems and the impact on the film's visuals. 
What can modern developers learn from this nostalgic look back at 90s tech?
#JurassicPark #RetroTech #SoftwareDevelopment
